description_long: This is a low-top athletic sneaker with a classic shell toe design, reminiscent of iconic streetwear shoes. The upper is primarily light gray or white, featuring three dark stripes on each side, which are characteristic of Adidas Superstar sneakers. The shoe has a standard lace-up closure with white laces and a padded collar for comfort. The heel and side stripes are in a contrasting dark color, adding visual interest and brand identity. The outsole appears flat and robust, suitable for urban walking, and the overall construction suggests a mix of synthetic leather and rubber materials. The shoe is clean and shows no visible signs of wear, indicating it is in new or like-new condition.
description: A classic low-top sneaker with a shell toe, three dark side stripes, and a lace-up closure, featuring a clean and sturdy design. The shoe is light gray or white with contrasting dark accents and appears new.
description_view_0: Front view showing the shell toe, laces, and the symmetrical shape of the shoe.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the three dark stripes and the low-top profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the padded heel and the back tab in a dark color.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with three dark stripes and a clear view of the sole's thickness.
attribute_logo: three parallel dark stripes on both sides of the shoe
